productDisplayName: W Women Printed White & Red Kurta
description: CompositionWhite and red printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket with red piping on either side of the placket and slit side seamsFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsEvery woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Model statisticsThe product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8", chest 33"
